global.description: The ad features a bold blue background with prominent text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting financial clarity with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A smooth, solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: An abstract arrangement of a circle and a square, lightly outlined, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Unidentified element
elements.description: An unspecified visual element that occupies a central position, details not discernible.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Your money, clearer No hidden fees' is prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer No hidden fees

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'SwiftStack' appears at the top of the ad in a clear, bold font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Start now' in a contrasting color, inviting interaction.
